title: Interactive ML Overview - digital textbook
description: Created during my internship at the Active Inference Institute. A high-level, interactive guide providing an overview of the machine learning landscape.

title: The Discovery Engine: AI-Driven Synthesis of Scientific Knowledge Landscapes
description: LLM-driven distillation of scientific literature into a computational Conceptual Tensor. Submitted to arXiv (May 2025).

title: Psychotherapy Support App (Mindly)
description: A web application helping users understand and manage emotions and thoughts using the ABC model from Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).

title: Visual Introduction to Active Inference
description: An introduction to programming active inference agents in Python with the pymdp package—visual and interactive.

title: Active Inference Loop
description: A brief visual explanation of the active inference concept.
